message:
bubbles: implement horizontal scrolling and unicode-aware line width

- Use visible_width() for accurate line width calculation with unicode
- Fix max_y_offset to use content_height for proper scrolling bounds
- Implement cut_line() for horizontal scrolling with x_offset support
- Update visible_lines() to apply horizontal offset and width constraints
- Update conformance test comments for view comparison logic

These changes improve viewport scrolling accuracy for content with
ANSI escapes and unicode characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
